item.title: Spain - Drought in Spain - 28/04/2023
item.dc:creator: raulnavarrocuello7
item.excerpt:encoded: SPAIN, LAKE SAU, APRIL 28. Lake Sau in Catalonia has become the symbol of drought in Spain. In addition to its recreational function, the lake provides drinking water to the region and its dam allows the production of hydroelectric power. However, for the past two years, the rainfall has been insufficient to ensure its filling, and the reservoir of the dam built on the Ter River has a filling deficit of some 90%. When the dam was built, the church of Sant Romà de Sau which had been submerged in 1966, as the whole village emptied of its inhabitants under 23 meters of water has reappeared. The drought that deprives the lake of water has brought the 11th-century Romanesque building back into the light and also revealed the waste that was at the bottom of the lake, but above all it endangers the supply of water and electricity to the people of Catalonia. On April 28, 2023, at Lake Say nearby Vic, Catalonia, Spain. Photo by Manuel Blondeau/ AOP.Press

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: a:6:{s:5:"width";i:654;s:6:"height";i:436;s:4:"file";s:87:"/home/wpcom/public_html/wp-content/blogs.dir/5ef/253997303/files/2026/04/sequisequi.jpg";s:8:"filesize";i:144943;s:5:"sizes";a:0:{}s:10:"image_meta";a:13:{s:8:"aperture";s:1:"0";s:6:"credit";s:32:"Manuel Blondeau/AOP.Press via Re";s:6:"camera";s:0:"";s:7:"caption";s:961:"SPAIN, LAKE SAU, APRIL 28. Lake Sau in Catalonia has become the symbol of drought in Spain. In addition to its recreational function, the lake provides drinking water to the region and its dam allows the production of hydroelectric power. However, for the past two years, the rainfall has been insufficient to ensure its filling, and the reservoir of the dam built on the Ter River has a filling deficit of some 90%. When the dam was built, the church of Sant Romà de Sau which had been submerged in 1966, as the whole village emptied of its inhabitants under 23 meters of water has reappeared. The drought that deprives the lake of water has brought the 11th-century Romanesque building back into the light and also revealed the waste that was at the bottom of the lake, but above all it endangers the supply of water and electricity to the people of Catalonia. On April 28, 2023, at Lake Say nearby Vic, Catalonia, Spain. Photo by Manuel Blondeau/ AOP.Press";s:17:"created_timestamp";s:10:"1682688528";s:9:"copyright";s:9:"AOP.Press";s:12:"focal_length";s:1:"0";s:3:"iso";s:1:"0";s:13:"shutter_speed";s:1:"0";s:5:"title";s:37:"Spain - Drought in Spain - 28/04/2023";s:11:"orientation";s:1:"1";s:8:"keywords";a:6:{i:0;s:7:"Drought";i:1;s:7:"Ecology";i:2;s:7:"Climate";i:3;s:5:"Water";i:4;s:9:"Catalonia";i:5;s:5:"Spain";}s:3:"alt";s:0:"";}}

item.title: PAU GASOL EN EL PARTIDO QUE LOS LAKERS DE LOS ÁNGELES GANARON A TIMBERWOLVES DE MINNESOTA POR 97-92
item.dc:creator: raulnavarrocuello7
item.excerpt:encoded: DEP03. LOS ÁNGELES (CALIFORNIA, EE.UU.), 17/03/2012.- El español Pau Gasol, jugador de Los Lakers, se hace con un rebote durante el partido de Liga de la NBA contra los Timberwolves de Minnesota que su equipo ganó 97-92 en el Staples Center de Los Ángeles, California (EE.UU.). EFE/ADRIÁN SÁNCHEZ-GONZÁLEZ

item.title: 98th Academy Awards - Oscars Arrivals - Hollywood
item.dc:creator: raulnavarrocuello7
item.excerpt:encoded: Jeong Hoon Seo, Mark Sonnenblick, EJAE, Joong Gyu Kwak, Yu Han Lee , winners of the Oscar for Best Original Song for "Golden" from "KPop Demon Hunters", pose at Governors Ball following the Oscars show at the 98th Academy Awards in Hollywood, Los Angeles, California, U.S., March 15, 2026. REUTERS/Carlos Barria

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: raulnavarrocuello7
item.content:encoded: This is an example of a page. Unlike posts, which are displayed on your blog’s front page in the order they’re published, pages are better suited for more timeless content that you want to be easily accessible, like your About or Contact information. Click the Edit link to make changes to this page or add another page.
